Website Parasite:
Craigslist
About Craigslist:
System Description: This is a proven system for posting multiple
ads to the popular classified site Craigslist.
Required Skills: No special skillset is required to post to Craig-
slist but if the ad needs to be written, it’s helpful to have some
copywriting experience.
System Checklist:
Step 1: Create Your Ad, Video 1
1. Does your headline have quotes around it?
2. Did you write 25 headlines before you chose the one
to use for your ad?
3. Did you write the body copy in a compelling fashion?
4. Is there a call-to-action in your body copy?
5. Do you have a special tracking link so you can track
the performance of your ad?
Step 2: Post Your Ad on Craigslist, Video 2
1. Do you have your ad in the right category?
2. Did you post at least in all the major cities?
Step 3: Post Your Ad With Easy Ad Poster Deluxe, Video 3 and 4
Weekly Action Plan:
Day 1 Task Checklist:
Write your ad
Day 2 Task Checklist:
Post your ad to major cities
Day 3 Task Checklist:
Automatically post via Easy
Ad Poster Deluxe
Day 4 Task Checklist:
Track your results
Day 5 Task Checklist:
Write a new ad

-- 1 of 2 --

1. Install and set up the software
2. Start posting automatically to Craigslist.
System Checklist:	Resources :
Craigslist:
www.Craigslist.org
Easy Ad Poster Deluxe:
www.EzAdSuite.com
Tips for Making the Most of This Traffic System:
Obviously the more ads you post, the better chances of getting a
lot of traffic. The automatic method of Easy Ad Poster Deluxe is
preferable; however, the manual method was shown in case only
one ad needed to be posted.

-- 2 of 2 --
